name: @aryan28/diff-guard
description: Impact-aware git diff CLI using WASM tree-sitter AST to map API blast radius.

scripts.build:grammars: shx mkdir -p grammars && npx tree-sitter build --wasm ./node_modules/tree-sitter-typescript/typescript && npx tree-sitter build --wasm ./node_modules/tree-sitter-javascript && npx tree-sitter build --wasm ./node_modules/tree-sitter-python && npx tree-sitter build --wasm ./node_modules/tree-sitter-java && npx tree-sitter build --wasm ./node_modules/tree-sitter-rust && npx tree-sitter build --wasm ./node_modules/tree-sitter-go && shx mv *.wasm ./grammars/

author: Aryan Gupta
